description: Strong against: Very high DPS build, Great in group fights
strengths: Good anti-buff utility with Mage Robe (purges melee buffs like Bloodletter / Axe spin).
weaknesses: Extremely squishy – Cryptcandle (less HP, more dmg taken) + cloth armor = paper-thin. One mistake an
Weak solo survivability - not made for solo fights. pvp
longDescription:
# Ava Fame Farm

## Overview
Strong against: Very high DPS build, Great in group fights

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
first when the caller starts aggro te mobs u will put magic rune spell to increase damage and healing then when he the caller use his E to pull all creeps inside u will cast inner shadow and then after 2 or 3 secs armor piercer so the  resistance of mobs decrease for more time and then use your Q  .  we will use circle of inspiration after fighiting each group of mobs to fillfull our mana. USe dodge spell whenever there is sudden attack from mob from unknown location
- **MAGICCIRCLE**: use the spell before fighting the mob
- **DYNAMIC_CURSE**: Damages enemies in a circle around you, then pulls them to center.

Great for clumping enemies & combo setups.
- **ARMORPIERCER**: Shoots a piercing projectile that reduces enemy resistances in a line.

Best used before bursting with E or teammates’ damage.
- **CURSEBLADE**: Throws a sickle in a line that returns, applying curses on enemies hit.

Great for stacking curses faster, especially against multiple enemies.
- **DODGE**: if we have a boss which has critical damage and instant random hittings we will use dodge spell to dodge from his  attacks . use carefully 
- **ENERGYFIELD**: as i said use circle of inspiration after each fight of mob
- **T7_POTION_STONESKIN@1**: best for mob fighting or if any gankers come so there will be less damage dealt to you

## Inventory
dont put potion in the gear . just put it in the inventory if gankers come u directly put it in the gear so we can save our self . 

## Strengths
- Very high DPS build
- Great in group fights
- Mana sustain
- Good anti-buff utility with Mage Robe (purges melee buffs like Bloodletter / Axe spin).

## Weaknesses
- Extremely squishy – Cryptcandle (less HP, more dmg taken) + cloth armor = paper-thin. One mistake an
- No defensive head/boots
- Weak solo survivability - not made for solo fights. pvp

title: Mist solo build
description: Strong against: Good outplay potential with Mistwalker invis + Undead Cape, Strong sustain (Battleaxe Q + passive heal)
strengths: Good outplay potential with Mistwalker invis + Undead Cape
weaknesses: No true burst; fights take time.
longDescription:
# Mist solo build

## Overview
Strong against: Good outplay potential with Mistwalker invis + Undead Cape, Strong sustain (Battleaxe Q + passive heal)

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Q spam → stack damage + heal.

W → gap close / extra dmg.

E → lifesteal spin when close.

Hunter Hood → reflect enemy burst.

Mistwalker Jacket → invis to dodge/reset.

Boots → chase or escape.

Undead Cape → auto-save when low
- **RENDINGCOMBO**: 
- **AXEBOOST**: 
- **AXETHROW**: 
- **RETALIATE2**: 
- **MIST_WALKER**: 
- **SPRINTHOT**: 
- **T7_POTION_REVIVE**: Use in PVP

## Inventory
Overcharge when PVP high IP player 

## Strengths
- Good outplay potential with Mistwalker invis + Undead Cape
- Strong sustain (Battleaxe Q + passive heal)
- Can bait enemies into overextending.
- High pressure damage over time

## Weaknesses
- Weak vs hard purge/silence (stops sustain).
- Relies on staying in melee.
- No true burst; fights take time.

## Video Guide
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vtDHrCPH6c4

weaknesses: Cannot be used to take high priority  cores and crystals over large distance solo.
longDescription:
# Solo Core/Crystal Rat Set

## Overview
Strong against: Very effective in ratting cores, power crystals., Allows you to solo approach targets even when being camped by large groups or zergs.

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
If the objective is surrounded by players dismounted and constantly on the lookout, dismount just outside [player tag view] zone; start approaching objective when only 10seconds left, and pop invis just when you see the first player tag; when near the objective use your guardian armor to push off other enemies and take it and run. If they have cc, they will try to stop you so use block, follow the combo and keep repeating to increase distance and run.  When 10 sec gap created swap to giga. 
- **T8_POTION_CLEANSE**: to approach the target while invisible.
- **WINDWALL**: 
- **DASH_KNOCKBACK**: 
- **BLOCK**: 
- **CARTWHEEL**: 
- **STUNRUN**: 
- **WANDERLUST**: 

## Inventory
swap for a longer invis approach

## Strengths
- Very effective in ratting cores, power crystals.
- Allows you to solo approach targets even when being camped by large groups or zergs.
- High Mobility rotation allows to cover large distance

## Weaknesses
- Cannot be used to take high priority  cores and crystals over large distance solo.

longDescription:
# 1h Nature - SOLO - Mist - Open World

## Overview
Strong against: Clear Speed, Boss Rampage

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
+ Using this combo will be good for clearing Knight Fall Abbey rooms! Very fast clear and good damage.
+ Combo will stack druid robe for more damage and clear will be Breeze.
- **SPELLRUSH**: + Use this before you do whole combo.
+ Reason is simple , you will clear mobs even faster or bosses in 10-30 seconds!
+ Use skill and do combo above said with nature. 6 Passive Buff will stack and damage will be INSANE.
- **THORNSAREA**: + First you use Q around the Knight Fall Abbey each Q on each part of mobs. 
- **THORNSAREA**: + First you use Q around the Knight Fall Abbey each Q on each part of mobs. 
- **BRAMBLESEED**: + After your Q mobs will come at you , try to stay on position where they will stack up at once. Use W to knock + deal insane damage on them.
- **CIRCLEOFLIFE**: + Then use E to deal damage + heal yourself. Leftover Mobs u can just spam Q and basic attack. 

### Combo 2
+ Wanderlust + Invis will make you escape ganker on your position , be fast otherwise you are dead.
- **WANDERLUST**: + If u hear / See enemy , Avoid using any Q or W , use boots Wanderlust and drink Invis potion go toward the gate. You will escape 100%.
- **T8_POTION_CLEANSE**: + Using Wanderlust + Invis will make you escape 100%. React before enemy reach YOU!

### Combo 3
+ This is for bosses. To Maximize damage on Boss!
- **SPELLRUSH**: + Use this before you do whole combo.
+ Reason is simple , you will clear mobs even faster or bosses in 10-30 seconds!
+ Use skill and do combo above said with nature. 6 Passive Buff will stack and damage will be INSANE.
- **THORNSAREA**: + First you use Q around the Knight Fall Abbey each Q on each part of mobs. 
- **THORNSAREA**: + First you use Q around the Knight Fall Abbey each Q on each part of mobs. 
- **BRAMBLESEED**: + After your Q mobs will come at you , try to stay on position where they will stack up at once. Use W to knock + deal insane damage on them.
- **ENERGYSHIELD2**: + When you don't have mana and few mobs are alive , Use shield and they hitting you will restore WHOLE energy bar back!
- **THORNSAREA**: + First you use Q around the Knight Fall Abbey each Q on each part of mobs. 
- **CIRCLEOFLIFE**: + Then use E to deal damage + heal yourself. Leftover Mobs u can just spam Q and basic attack. 

## Strengths
- Clear Speed
- Boss Rampage
- Self-Sustain
- Energy always here

## Weaknesses
- One Chance to Escape
- Low Movement
- Squishy by Players

- **QDASH**: Use in 99% of the situations offers less damaged than Sunder Armor but the extra mobility from it is essential for this build.

- **DEEPCUTS**: Strongest option vs healer + dps use in combo with e or on cool down when enemy is at pressure. Swap to dash/chain Slash vs double dps.
Swap to Shadow Edge vs grail + dagger or any comp that is hard to catch.

Resistance pot vs one shots and cleans pot vs stun comps. Siphoned energy for extra ip (optional)

- Great Budget weapon

### Combo 1
Basic combo against melees, use your E+W when the enemy melee is close enough to stun him with your W, and just after your W ends, freeze him with your E. After the iceberg explodes, use your D to do more dmg

# Stronger cursed staff DPS

## Overview
Strong against: High DPS, A lot of protection

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Sneak on them with invis potion, use desecrate to root them stack a vile curse on them. Then quickly follow up with a death curse the two more vile curses.
- **T8_POTION_CLEANSE**: Escape, repositioning, sneak attacks
- **CURSENOVA**: Roots them, you can stack an extra vile curse or two. You can also reposition, escape, or heal
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **DEATHCURSE2**: High burst damage
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit

### Combo 2
Use rejuvenating sprint to heal with everlasting heal as a shield and damage buff with emergency shield as a backup and buffer. NOTE: Do NOT use all at once use them when needed 
- **SPRINTHOT**: Gives heal, you can use wander lust if you want
- **LIFESAVIOR**: Gives more protection able to tank more high damage
- **EMERGENCY_SHIELD**: Protection shield

### Combo 3
This is the same as combo 1, however you can stack two combo 1s in a short duration
- **T8_POTION_CLEANSE**: Escape, repositioning, sneak attacks
- **CURSENOVA**: Roots them, you can stack an extra vile curse or two. You can also reposition, escape, or heal
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **DEATHCURSE2**: High burst damage
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **SUMMONER_CD_REDUCTION**: Allows you to stack multiple death curse in a short duration
- **CURSENOVA**: Roots them, you can stack an extra vile curse or two. You can also reposition, escape, or heal
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **DEATHCURSE2**: High burst damage
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit
- **CURSEDOT**: More easy to hit

## Inventory
Gathering, use assassin's jacket to escape. First run away use soldier boots ability to get away and reset combat lock, then swap to assassin's jacket and use ambush to hide then safely mount up.

## Strengths
- High DPS
- A lot of protection
- Sneak attacks
- Escape

## Weaknesses
- Slight glass cannon
- Medium heal
- Medium heal
- Purge and cleanse spells maybe reflecting spells

description: Strong against: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content., High fame and silver per hour.
strengths: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content.
High fame and silver per hour.
Self-sufficient; great mana sustain minimizes downtime.
Relatively easy and straightforward gameplay loop.
weaknesses: Very weak in PVP. This is not a build for fighting other players.

longDescription:
# Greataxe PVE Speed-Farmer

## Overview
Strong against: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content., High fame and silver per hour.

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Step-by-Step Rotation:
1. Pull Mobs: Use Wanderlust on your Soldier Boots to run between mob packs, gathering them into a tight ball.
2. Activate AOE Aura: Once they are grouped on you, activate Electric Field on your Stalker Jacket.
3. Execute Damage Combo: Use Whirlwind (W) and immediately follow it with Rending Spin (E) to deal massive AOE damage. Use your Rending Strike (Q) on any remaining single targets.
4. Manage Your Mana: When you see your mana dropping, use Energy Shield on your Schola
- **T6_POTION_COOLDOWN**: 
- **RENDINGCOMBO**: 
- **ENERGY_BARRIER**: 
- **STORMSHIELD**: 
- **BLADE_AURA**: 
- **AXEWHIRLWIND2**: 

## Strengths
- Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content.
- High fame and silver per hour.
- Self-sufficient; great mana sustain minimizes downtime.
- Relatively easy and straightforward gameplay loop.
- 

## Weaknesses
- Very weak in PVP. This is not a build for fighting other players.
- Can be vulnerable to mobs with heavy crowd control (CC) or purges.
- Can be somewhat expensive due to the Stalker Jacket.
-

title: Earthrune Group PvE Tanking
description: Strong against: Very high max HP, Plenty of easy AoE interrupts to help support
strengths: Plenty of easy AoE interrupts to help support
Can shield melee allied DPS or off-tanks
Multiple options to pull or swap aggro
weaknesses: Very low damage output, cannot function without capable DPS
Golem form very large, can block allies’ vision or accidentally set off traps
Most abilities have channel, can be difficult to get them off if mobility is required
Not much movement options, low mobility and can’t keep up easily
Vulnerable to stuns and other crowd control effects
longDescription:
# Earthrune Group PvE Tanking

## Overview
Strong against: Very high max HP, Plenty of easy AoE interrupts to help support

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Positional Drift to group enemies, Adapting Matter to shield self and allies as well as get shift charges, transform (make sure to be behind enemies to not block allies’ vision), use tectonic shift for further grouping and AoE interrupt, use again immediately for combo and more AoE interrupt, then use Boulder Crash repeatedly for even more AoE interrupt until transformation wears off or need to manually transform back.
- **SHAPE_W_AREA_PULL**: Pull enemies to interrupt and reposition them, can pull aggro as well. Good to group enemies for allies or own AoE.
- **SHAPE_Q_DAMAGE_AND_SHIELD**: Make sure to be close enough to enemy to shield self and melee allies, or target self or melee allies if needed
- **SHAPESHIFT_ROCK_ELEMENTAL**: Transform once shift charges are full, or to reposition and pull aggro. Try to transform behind enemies to not block allies’ vision, and so enemies AoE attacks don’t hit allies.
- **ROCK_ELEMENTAL_SPLITTING_EARTH**: Can use once to pull enemies towards self, then use again to do AoE interrupt.
- **ROCK_ELEMENTAL_SPLITTING_EARTH**: Can use once to pull enemies towards self, then use again to do AoE interrupt.
- **ROCK_ELEMENTAL_STONE_THROW**: Use as often as possible, try to time it for small AoE interrupts. Use after Tectonic Shift for better grouping.

## Strengths
- Very high max HP
- Plenty of easy AoE interrupts to help support
- Can pull and position enemies
- Can shield melee allied DPS or off-tanks
- Multiple options to pull or swap aggro

## Weaknesses
- Very low damage output, cannot function without capable DPS
- Golem form very large, can block allies’ vision or accidentally set off traps
- Most abilities have channel, can be difficult to get them off if mobility is required
- Not much movement options, low mobility and can’t keep up easily
- Vulnerable to stuns and other crowd control effects

title: TANK @Grupales
longDescription:
# TANK @Grupales

## Overview
A tank build for other_location

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Botas + pecho para atraer el agro y reducir el daño que te hacen. Luego tiras compresor + casco o sólo compresor para atraer a los enemigos hacia tí, das una o dos Qs dependido si llevas Caerleon o no y finalizas con tu E.
- **SPRINTHOT**: Cualquier bota con la segunda habilidad sirve.
- **ENFEEBLEAURA**: Reduce enormemente el daño recibido por mobs. En caso de tener poco spec y por ende no tener casi agro, es mucho mejor usar Provocar.
- **PBAOE_PULL**: Cambia a Guard Rune en los bosses.
- **BLOCK**: Úsalo después de tu compresor en pulls muy grandes o para mitigar daño.
- **SHRINKINGSMASH**: Nada que decir. Para PVE grupal la mejor habilidad.
- **THREATENINGSMASH**: Para agarrar agro de los mobs. Si el TANQUE tiene poco spec, puede usar una Capa de Caerleon para duplicar el agro de su Q.

title: ShadowCaller
longDescription:
# ShadowCaller 

## Overview
A dps build for ava-dungeon

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Na start pull-a używasz butów aby zwiększyć DMG gdy pojawi się GA używasz kurtki i pochodzisz do mobów, rzucasz 2x Q pod moby (2 razy ponieważ peleryna resetuje ci CD). Następnie gdy efekt GA zniknie używasz E na Main Tanka które zmniejsza odporności na obrażenia, używasz W które ściągając stacki z moba zadaje obszarowy efekt zadający dodatkowy Damage. Na koniec rzucasz kapuzę czyli manę pod nogi sojusznikom i sobie.
- **GLASS_MOVESPEED**: Zwiększają zadawany damage 
- **BURNAURA**: Po użyciu tworzy się do okoła ciebie duże pole płomieni które zadaje damage mobom. Pamiętaj że palisz się też ty także włączona kurtka zabiera ci stopniowo HP również nakłada ci Debuff-a do otrzymywanego leczenia -50% dlatego jeśli masz około 20%HP lepiej wyłącz kurtkę aby można było cię odleczyć
- **CURSED_SPLAT**: Rzucając plamą pod moby nabijasz im stacki.
- **CURSED_SPLAT**: Rzucając plamą pod moby nabijasz im stacki.
- **DYNAMIC_CURSE**: Używasz tej umiejetności na Main Tanku chwilę przed końcem trwania efektu GA na mobach (GA trwa 3,5sek) umiejętność zbija odporności na obrażenia mobom
- **CURSEDBEAM**: Używając W ściągasz stacki z moba przez co zadaje to DMG obszarowy
- **ENERGYFIELD**: Używasz kiedy masz możliwość, tworzy pod tobą pole która odnawia manę tobie i twoim sojusznikom

A dps/other_role build for ava-dungeon

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Na start Pull-a zaznaczasz myszką jednego z mobów i czekasz aż moby będą w GA następnie klikasz E, zaznaczasz drugiego moba i znów używasz E miedzy mobami pojawi się linka, następnie używasz F aby zwiększyć DMG, następnie używasz kurtki i podchodzisz z nią do mobów tak aby dostawały od niej damage, następnie używasz kapturu by zresetować CD, Jeśli będziesz mieć dostępną umiejętność E a moby nadal będą żyć użyj jej jeszcze raz.
- **SOUL_LINK**: W trakcie pulla łączysz dwa moby jeden z drugim. Na starcie pull-a możesz zaznaczyć sobie jednego z mobków gdy zobaczysz moby stoją w GA możesz użyć na mobku E, następnie klikasz na drugiego moba i znów używasz E. W ten sposób tworzysz linkę łączącą dwa moby która mnoży i rozdziela zadawany przez party damage między te moby.
- **GLASS_MOVESPEED**: 
- **STORMSHIELD**: 
- **SUMMONER_CD_REDUCTION**: Używany do skracania CD na umiejętnościach.
- **SOUL_LINK**: W trakcie pulla łączysz dwa moby jeden z drugim. Na starcie pull-a możesz zaznaczyć sobie jednego z mobków gdy zobaczysz moby stoją w GA możesz użyć na mobku E, następnie klikasz na drugiego moba i znów używasz E. W ten sposób tworzysz linkę łączącą dwa moby która mnoży i rozdziela zadawany przez party damage między te moby.

title: Great Arcane
longDescription:
# Great Arcane

## Overview
A crowd_control build for ava-dungeon

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Używasz umiejętności GA w momencie gdy usłyszysz od Main Tanka ,,GA" lub ,,Arkan" wtedy staraj się złapać umiejętnością wszystkie moby. Następnie użyj W na froscie ,wtedy będziesz mieć możliwość postawienia obelisku ,który postaw tak aby sięgnął party i ciebie, następnie użyj kurtki aby skrócić CD na umiejętności E w trakcie gdy uruchomi się kurtka możesz użyć D aby jeszcze bardziej przyśpieszyć odnawianie umiejętności. Gdy będziesz mieć dostępne E czekaj na call-a od Main Tanka
- **TIME_FREEZE**: Umiejętność zaczynająca pulla rzucasz ją na call-a ,,GA" lub ,,Arkan"
Tworzy okrągłe pole pod mobami które zatrzymuje je w miejscu. Zazwyczaj będziesz używać go w momencie gdy moby zbiorą się w jednym miejscu a najczęściej będzie to na pączku od Main Tanka
- **MIMIC**: Użyty na froscie daje umiejętność obelisku. Obelisk daje bonus do DMG + CD Zalecam używanie go non stop do odnowienia CD dla party i main tanka
- **ROYAL_BANNER**: Używasz kurtki zaraz po rzuceniu Obelisku, staraj się stać w takim miejscu aby twoje party dostało buff-a 
- **SUMMONER_CD_REDUCTION**: Używany do odnowienia CD na umiejętnościach broni i kurtki (E,R)
- **TIME_FREEZE**: Umiejętność zaczynająca pulla rzucasz ją na call-a ,,GA" lub ,,Arkan"
Tworzy okrągłe pole pod mobami które zatrzymuje je w miejscu. Zazwyczaj będziesz używać go w momencie gdy moby zbiorą się w jednym miejscu a najczęściej będzie to na pączku od Main Tanka

# CH combat Looter

## Overview
Strong against: large damaged area, with the passive from the morgana cape, skill one can be spammed faster

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
The cloak skill is used to stack skill stacks to increase damage bonuses, then the glacial obelisk skill is used to increase damage and speed up cooldowns, the perpetual energy skill is used to prevent mana from running out quickly, the shoe skill is used to increase damage, then the E skill is used on oneself to activate Morgana's cape skill, and next spam the ice shard skill on the target.
- **SPELLRUSH**: 
- **ICE_SCULPTURE**: 
- **PERPETUALENERGY**:

if the calming available in the slot runs out

title: Phantom Executioner
description: Strong against: High mobility, Fast execution
longDescription:
# Phantom Executioner

## Overview
Strong against: High mobility, Fast execution 

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Approach:

Use an Invisibility Potion to approach a gathering or dismounted target.

Use Deadly Swipe (Q) to spam the enemy while stacking.

Execution:

When the enemy's HP drops below 40%, use Bloodletter E (Lunging Stabs) to execute.

If this fails, use Specter Hood to reset, then spam the combo again.

Escape:

If things get worse, use Rush (Hunter Shoes) to sprint away.

Use a second Invisibility Potion if necessary to completely disappear.
- **QDASH**: 
- **QDASH**: 
- **RAPIERSTAB**: 
- **SPRINT_CD_REDUCTION**: 
- **T8_POTION_CLEANSE**: 

## Strengths
- High mobility
- Fast execution 

## Weaknesses
- wasteful of energy
- less effective in zvz

description: Strong against: Fast Clear, Fast Cooldown Mobility
strengths: 3-5 minutes Max infamy to summon boss
longDescription:
# Corrupted Dungeon PvE + Anti Invader

## Overview
Strong against: Fast Clear, Fast Cooldown Mobility

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Bossing
- **HELMET_FIREBREATH**: When W skill are on cooldown, Use it
When invaded, activate nearby trap with this (No standing animation) 
- **FLAMEPILLAR**: One Shot Kill Imps and Hounds. Always use E first, 7 second Cooldown
- **FIRESTAFFBOLT_AOE**: Q + E or Q + W for clearing Arbalist, Monsterity, Mage, and Prowler
- **FIRECONE**: Q + W + E for clearing Brawler, Thief, and Slaver
Change to W2 when invaded

## Inventory
Eat when invaded

## Strengths
- Fast Clear
- Fast Cooldown Mobility
- 3-5 minutes Max infamy to summon boss
- 

## Weaknesses
- Can't do PvP with metas

- **REJUVMUSHROOM_GRENADE**: Planta os alface perto da pool que o tank vai fazer
- **REJUVMUSHROOM_GRENADE**: Planta os alface perto da pool que o tank vai fazer
- **SOUL_LINK**: Linka os principais mobs
- **REANIMATE**: Cura o tank enquanto estiver na pool
- **ROYAL_BANNER**: Reseta os cooldowns
- **SPRINT_CD_REDUCTION**: Mais Cooldown

# Polehammer DPS

## Overview
Strong against: Long range engage with good kite potential and damage output.

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
full damage combo on your rotation. use this then leave
- **GROUNDBREAKER2**: 
- **HYPER_FOCUS**: use this before you channel W
- **HAMMER_TREMOR**: 
- **HAMMER_SHOVE**: 
- **LIFESTEALAURA**: use this to survive either a brawl after hit or when walking in to hit

## Strengths
- Long range engage with good kite potential and damage output.

## Weaknesses
- when enemy has several cleanses feels pretty bad.

title: Greataxe PVE Speed-Farmer
description: Strong against: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content., High fame and silver per hour.
strengths: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content.
High fame and silver per hour.
Self-sufficient; great mana sustain minimizes downtime.
Relatively easy and straightforward gameplay loop.
weaknesses: Very weak in PVP. This is not a build for fighting other players.
Can be vulnerable to mobs with heavy crowd control (CC) or purges.
Can be somewhat expensive due to the Stalker Jacket.
longDescription:
# Greataxe PVE Speed-Farmer

## Overview
Strong against: Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content., High fame and silver per hour.

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Step-by-Step Rotation:
1. Pull Mobs: Use Wanderlust on your Soldier Boots to run between mob packs, gathering them into a tight ball.
2. Activate AOE Aura: Once they are grouped on you, activate Electric Field on your Stalker Jacket.
3. Execute Damage Combo: Use Whirlwind (W) and immediately follow it with Rending Spin (E) to deal massive AOE damage. Use your Rending Strike (Q) on any remaining single targets.
4. Manage Your Mana: When you see your mana dropping, use Energy Shield on your Schola
- **T6_POTION_COOLDOWN**: 
- **RENDINGCOMBO**: 
- **ENERGY_BARRIER**: 
- **STORMSHIELD**: 
- **BLADE_AURA**: 
- **AXEWHIRLWIND2**: 

## Strengths
- Extremely fast clearing speed for PVE content.
- High fame and silver per hour.
- Self-sufficient; great mana sustain minimizes downtime.
- Relatively easy and straightforward gameplay loop.
- 

## Weaknesses
- Very weak in PVP. This is not a build for fighting other players.
- Can be vulnerable to mobs with heavy crowd control (CC) or purges.
- Can be somewhat expensive due to the Stalker Jacket.
-

title: Frost Ghost
longDescription:
# Frost Ghost

## Overview
A dps build for open_world/solo-dungeon/depths/hellgate/mists/knightfall_abbey/arena

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Go invis and charge up power, after 5 seconds mark someone and rush in on them and immediantely trigger Mortal Agony, slow them down with Frozen Surge then delete their health with Arctic Volley, backing away as you use it to regain a safe distance.
- **AMBUSH**: Use this to wait out your cooldowns safely
- **DEATHMARK**: Escape and Chase option.
(escape only works with allies)
- **SMELLOFBLOOD**: Use this right before doing a combo
- **SHATTER_Q**: Good for kiting and you should always use before using Arctic Volley.

# Cc Monster

## Overview
A crowd_control build for hellgate/arena

## Skill Combos

### Combo 1
Slow them down to help not mess up the combo, set up the teleport to where you want to pull them, quicky teleport on top of your desired target and use Soul Chain, then let the magic happen.
- **SHATTER_Q**: Main source of damage and constant slows.
- **DELAYED_TELEPORT**: Never teleport in the direction you are already running, run left and teleport right. 
(vice versa as well)
- **FROSTNOVA**: More mobility is always nice
- **ARMORCHAIN**: Use right after setting up a delayed teleport with Mage Sandals and either Glacial Prisoning an enemy or using Frost Nova to get on top of an enemy.

### Combo 2
Freeze the target, walk up to them and set up the delayed teleport up, Soul Chain them, let the magic happen. Simple!
- **FROZEN_CRYSTAL**: The setup for insta-kills and crazy cc setups.
- **DELAYED_TELEPORT**: Never teleport in the direction you are already running, run left and teleport right. 
(vice versa as well)
- **ARMORCHAIN**: Use right after setting up a delayed teleport with Mage Sandals and either Glacial Prisoning an enemy or using Frost Nova to get on top of an enemy.

- **HAMMER_SHOVE**: Used for damage in one vs ones and can be used to safely deal aoe damage in group fights.
- **GROUNDBREAKER2**: Used as a safe poke against ranged enemies or as an extra stun and damage.
- **LEVITATE**: Main source of self sustain.
- **ARMOR_CD_RESET**: Used right after your first time Cultists Robe.
- **HAMMER_SHOVE**: Used for damage in one vs ones and can be used to safely deal aoe damage in group fights.
